title: Stochastic Methods for Bilevel Optimization
summary: Derivative-free and stochastic approaches for mixed-integer bilevel optimization, with experiments in neural architecture search.
image_alt: Abstract line plot representing bilevel optimization experiments

title: 3D Printing Flexibility in Supply Chains
summary: Simulation-based study of stochastic assembly systems where 3D printing can replace or supplement traditional manufacturing capacity.
image_alt: Abstract line plot representing stochastic supply chain simulation

title: Outpatient Clinic Stochastic Programming
summary: Two-stage stochastic programming model for clinic scheduling under patient no-shows, walk-in arrivals, and uncertain service times.
image_alt: Abstract line plot representing healthcare operations modeling
